schemes.name: PM-KISAN Samman Nidhi
schemes.description: Income support of ₹6,000 per year in three installments to eligible landholding farmer families.
schemes.eligibility: Landholding farmer families; cultivable land records; excludes institutional landholders and higher-income categories per rules.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
schemes.description: Crop insurance against non-preventable natural risks from pre-sowing to post-harvest.
schemes.benefit: Low farmer premium; claim for crop loss
schemes.eligibility: Farmers growing notified crops in notified areas during the crop season; enroll through bank or CSC.
schemes.documents: Aadhaar, land details, sowing certificate, bank account

schemes.name: PM Krishi Sinchayee Yojana
schemes.description: Improves water use efficiency through micro-irrigation, watershed development, and irrigation projects.
schemes.benefit: Subsidy on drip/sprinkler and water-saving infrastructure
schemes.eligibility: Farmers, FPOs, and state agencies per component guidelines.
schemes.documents: Land proof, Aadhaar, bank details, project proposal (if applicable)

schemes.name: Agriculture Infrastructure Fund
schemes.description: Medium-long term debt financing for post-harvest infrastructure and community farming assets.
schemes.benefit: Interest subvention and credit guarantee support
schemes.eligibility: Farmers, FPOs, agri-entrepreneurs, startups, and local bodies for eligible projects.

schemes.name: Soil Health Card Scheme
schemes.description: Soil testing and nutrient recommendations to optimize fertilizer use.
schemes.eligibility: All farmers; contact local agriculture office or soil testing lab.

schemes.name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
schemes.description: Timely credit for crop cultivation, post-harvest needs, and allied activities.
schemes.benefit: Flexible credit limit; concessional interest for prompt repayment
schemes.eligibility: Farmers including tenant farmers / oral lessees / sharecroppers per bank norms.
schemes.documents: Aadhaar, land records/tenant proof, passport photos, bank KYC

schemes.name: Rythu Bandhu (Telangana)
schemes.description: Investment support for agriculture and horticulture crops per acre per season.
schemes.eligibility: Telangana farmers with pattadar passbooks for eligible land.

schemes.name: YSR Rythu Bharosa (Andhra Pradesh)
schemes.description: Financial assistance to farmers including tenant farmers for crop investment.
schemes.eligibility: AP farmers and eligible tenant farmers per land records.

schemes.name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana
schemes.description: Promotes organic farming through cluster approach and PGS certification support.
schemes.benefit: Financial assistance per hectare for organic conversion
schemes.eligibility: Farmers willing to adopt organic practices in groups/clusters.

schemes.name: Sub-Mission on Agricultural Mechanization
schemes.description: Subsidy for farm machinery and equipment to reduce drudgery and improve efficiency.
schemes.benefit: Subsidy on tractors, tillers, planters, and custom hiring centers
schemes.eligibility: Farmers, FPOs, entrepreneurs per state SMAM guidelines.
schemes.documents: Aadhaar, quotation, bank account, land proof
